message:
chore: close Wave A parent bead (bd-3uqg.4) and relocate Azure smoke test section

Two housekeeping changes from ongoing provider onboarding work:

1. **Issue tracker** — Mark bd-3uqg.4 (Wave A onboarding parent) as
   closed with reason "Completed: A1-A4 onboarding + parity verification
   closed; Wave A criteria satisfied with documented v0 deferral".  All
   four child batches (A1-A4) were previously closed; this closes the
   parent roll-up bead to reflect that Wave A is fully satisfied.

2. **Test reorganization** — Move the "Azure OpenAI Provider Smoke Tests"
   section header comment block from between the openai_smoke and
   sap_smoke modules to directly above the azure_smoke module where it
   belongs.  This was a misplaced section divider that made the test file
   harder to navigate — no test logic changed, only the position of the
   four-line comment banner.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -671,7 +671,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.3","title":"[PROVIDER-NATIVE-VERIFY] Native cluster B parity slice","description":"Execute native verification for cluster B providers (SAP, GitLab, Cloudflare, Azure, special routes) including normalization and failure-path diagnostics.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Cluster B providers pass standardized harness unit and e2e parity scenarios, including special-route semantics. 2) Deviations include explicit evidence, mitigation, and follow-up beads with ownership. 3) Logs/transcripts are complete, structured, and secret-redacted.","notes":"AmberHill progress 2026-02-10: completed GitLab verification slice in provider_native_verify harness (gitlab_smoke suite: simple/unicode/error401/error400/error429, all passing). Remaining cluster-B closure depends on special-routes + SAP tasks (bd-3uqg.3.9 and bd-3uqg.3.4).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AmberHill","owner":"AmberHill","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:40:49.947818307Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T17:37:48.039939719Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:42:14.108461881Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:42:14.443115954Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:42:14.779567826Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:42:15.107608339Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:40:49.947818307Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:42:13.764494118Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:42:15.452613374Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.4","title":"[PROVIDER-NATIVE-VERIFY] Consolidated native parity report","description":"Consolidate native verification outcomes into one parity report with pass and fail matrix, deviations, and follow-up actions.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Consolidated report covers every native provider with links to unit evidence, e2e scripts, logs, and transcripts. 2) Deviations include root cause, user impact, mitigation, and follow-up bead references. 3) Report is machine-checkable and consumable by test/docs/rollup gates.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:40:50.395811202Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T02:59:53.952408074Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:40:50.395811202Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:42:15.819352476Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.3.8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:42:16.173955982Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3uqg.3.9","title":"[PROVIDER-NATIVE] Resolve special routing providers (vercel/opencode/zenmux)","description":"For vercel, opencode, and zenmux IDs, decide and implement whether Wave-C preset beads consume this outcome rather than re-deciding it.","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:25:30Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-3uqg.4.1","title":"[PROVIDER-OAI-A] Batch A1 preset onboarding","description":"Integrate IDs: 302ai, abacus, aihubmix, bailing, berget, chutes, cortecs, fastrouter. Add canonical metadata, base URL defaults, env-key mapping, and alias tests.","acceptance_criteria":"1) All providers in Wave A batch A1 are onboarded with canonical IDs/aliases. 2) Unit/contract tests cover preset behavior and routing correctness. 3) E2E logs for representative scenarios are produced.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"TopazFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:15:45.124269256Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T07:35:43.408841119Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T07:35:43.408756121Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:22:37.196842738Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:15:45.124269256Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:22:37.408999284Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":956,"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed Batch A1 provider onboarding. Added 8 OAI-compatible providers to PROVIDER_METADATA:

**Providers added** (canonical_id → base_url → env_key):
- 302ai → https://api.302.ai/v1 → 302AI_API_KEY
- abacus → https://routellm.abacus.ai/v1 → ABACUS_API_KEY
- aihubmix → https://aihubmix.com/v1 → AIHUBMIX_API_KEY
- bailing → https://api.tbox.cn/api/llm/v1 → BAILING_API_TOKEN
- berget → https://api.berget.ai/v1 → BERGET_API_KEY
- chutes → https://llm.chutes.ai/v1 → CHUTES_API_KEY
- cortecs → https://api.cortecs.ai/v1 → CORTECS_API_KEY
- fastrouter → https://go.fastrouter.ai/api/v1 → FASTROUTER_API_KEY

All base URLs and env keys sourced from models.dev upstream registry.

**Files changed:**
- src/provider_metadata.rs: 8 new entries + 4 new tests (metadata, env keys, routing, URL uniqueness)
- tests/provider_backward_lock.rs: factory routing test for all 8 providers
- docs/provider-implementation-modes.json: 8 entries updated from deferred-watchlist/gateway-wrapper → oai-compatible-preset

**Test results:** 132 backward-lock tests pass (was 131), 151 provider streaming tests pass, 9 provider_metadata tests pass. Clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-02-10T07:35:37Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3uqg.4.2","title":"[PROVIDER-OAI-A] Batch A2 preset onboarding","description":"Integrate IDs: fireworks-ai, firmware, friendli, github-models, helicone, huggingface, iflowcn, inception, inference. Ensure provider-specific header/query config support where needed.","acceptance_criteria":"1) All providers in Wave A batch A2 are onboarded and selectable. 2) Unit/contract tests verify request/auth behavior consistency. 3) E2E scenario logs are captured for parity checks.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"TopazFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:15:45.194182682Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T07:43:58.668228396Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T07:43:58.668124873Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:15:45.194182682Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:22:37.638786076Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":958,"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed Batch A2 provider onboarding. Added 8 new OAI-compatible providers to PROVIDER_METADATA (fireworks-ai was already present as alias for 'fireworks'):

**Providers added** (canonical_id → base_url → env_key):
- firmware → https://app.firmware.ai/api/v1 → FIRMWARE_API_KEY
- friendli → https://api.friendli.ai/serverless/v1 → FRIENDLI_TOKEN
- github-models → https://models.github.ai/inference → GITHUB_TOKEN
- helicone → https://ai-gateway.helicone.ai/v1 → HELICONE_API_KEY
- huggingface → https://router.huggingface.co/v1 → HF_TOKEN
- iflowcn → https://apis.iflow.cn/v1 → IFLOW_API_KEY
- inception → https://api.inceptionlabs.ai/v1 → INCEPTION_API_KEY
- inference → https://inference.net/v1 → INFERENCE_API_KEY

Also fixed a pre-existing compilation error in auth.rs (token_url_str rename).

**Files changed:**
- src/provider_metadata.rs: 8 new entries + 5 new tests
- tests/provider_backward_lock.rs: factory routing test for 8 Batch A2 providers
- docs/provider-implementation-modes.json: 8 entries updated + count adjustments
- src/auth.rs: fixed token_url_str reference (pre-existing error from another agent)

**Test results:** 133 backward-lock tests, 152 streaming tests, 14 provider_metadata tests. Clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-02-10T07:43:50Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3uqg.4.3","title":"[PROVIDER-OAI-A] Batch A3 preset onboarding","description":"Integrate IDs: io-net, jiekou, lucidquery, moark, morph, nano-gpt, nova, novita-ai, nvidia. Validate canonical-ID selection and auth resolution.","acceptance_criteria":"1) All providers in Wave A batch A3 are integrated with canonical metadata parity. 2) Unit/contract tests confirm routing, auth handling, and behavior normalization. 3) Representative e2e scripts produce structured logs/transcripts for parity review.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"TopazFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:15:45.509710873Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T07:51:12.026644356Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T07:51:12.026550101Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:15:45.509710873Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3uqg.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:22:37.833510526Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":959,"issue_id":"bd-3uqg.4.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"TopazFalcon completed Batch A3 onboarding:

**9 providers added** to PROVIDER_METADATA:
- io-net, jiekou, lucidquery, moark, morph, nano-gpt, nova, novita-ai, nvidia

**Tests added:**
- 4 unit tests in provider_metadata.rs (batch_a3_metadata_resolves_all_nine_providers, batch_a3_env_keys_match_upstream_registry, batch_a3_routing_defaults_use_openai_completions, batch_a3_base_urls_are_distinct_and_nonempty)
- 1 factory routing test in provider_backward_lock.rs (factory_routes_batch_a3_providers_correctly)

**Docs updated:**
- docs/provider-implementation-modes.json: 9 entries updated from deferred-watchlist to oai-compatible-preset, counts updated (oai-compatible-preset: 37, deferred-watchlist: 31)

**Test results:** 135 backward-lock, 152 streaming - all pass.","created_at":"2026-02-10T07:51:05Z"}]}
